title: Data Structure and Algorithm Design Capstone · Execution Trace: Correctness Argument
summary: Design a dispatch index for mixed lookup, priority, path, and update workloads. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa correctness argument increment in a defended multi-structure dispatch system. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Present loop invariants, induction, or contradiction arguments appropriate to each component.
Combine structures while documenting duplicated state and synchronization invariants.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
